identity.name: CableThermal AI
identity.vibe: Dark mode technical dashboard meets cyberpunk precision

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-black hover:bg-cyan-400 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 hover:border-cyan-500 hover:text-cyan-400 transition-all duration-300

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800/80 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 rounded-md font-mono text-sm

visual_assets.background_texture: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%), linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) 1px, transparent 1px)

structure: Hero Section: High-impact visualization of cable heat map + Value Prop
Features Grid: 3-col bento grid showing 'Standards Compliance', 'D3 Visualization', 'Report Gen'
Interactive Demo Preview: A mini-calculator or static heatmap that animates
Header: User profile, Quick Calculation btn
Main Area: Project Grid (Recent calculations with mini-charts)
Stats Row: System Status, Latest Standards Updates
Cable List: Cards with technical specs (Cross-section area, Ampacity rating)
Detail View: Tabbed interface (Conductor, Insulation, Sheath)
Split Layout: Left form inputs, Right real-time D3 visualization
Results: Bottom drawer or final step with Contour Plots

universal_guidelines: ALWAYS use a 'dark' class on the HTML/Body tag by default.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-950 (#09090b) for background to reduce eye strain.
Use 'cyan-400' or 'cyan-500' for primary actions and accents. It pops against the dark theme.
Input fields must have a monospace font family (JetBrains Mono) to emphasize precision.
D3 Charts must be styled with the dark theme in mind: dark backgrounds, bright lines/areas.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (glow or border color change).
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (Cyan on Zinc-950 is high contrast).
